name: Launch Spine
signal: Ship one visible improvement before UTC sunset.
ritual: Pick one card from shipyard and move it to done in one sitting.

name: Signal Lantern
signal: Publish short updates that explain what changed and why.
ritual: Post a captain log entry with one screenshot and one lesson.

name: Quiet Thermals
signal: Keep the base stable without stalling momentum.
ritual: Run a quick polish pass on navigation and wording.

name: Scout Arc
signal: Prototype one small idea before committing full build time.
ritual: Test visual or interaction concept in the lab.

name: Storm Compass
signal: Build one weird thing that keeps the site fun.
ritual: Spin a quest and ship the result even if rough.
